description: Nowledge Mem Codex lifecycle hook — best-effort transcript capture after each turn

hooks.command: if [ -f "$HOME/.codex/hooks/nowledge-mem-stop-save.py" ]; then python3 "$HOME/.codex/hooks/nowledge-mem-stop-save.py" --event stop; else python3 "${PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/nmem-stop-save.py" --event stop; fi
hooks.commandWindows:
if exist "%USERPROFILE%\.codex\hooks
owledge-mem-stop-save.py" (python "%USERPROFILE%\.codex\hooks
owledge-mem-stop-save.py" --event stop || py -3 "%USERPROFILE%\.codex\hooks
owledge-mem-stop-save.py" --event stop || python3 "%USERPROFILE%\.codex\hooks
owledge-mem-stop-save.py" --event stop) else (python "%PLUGIN_ROOT%\hooks
mem-stop-save.py" --event stop || py -3 "%PLUGIN_ROOT%\hooks
mem-stop-save.py" --event stop || python3 "%PLUGIN_ROOT%\hooks
mem-stop-save.py" --event stop)
hooks.statusMessage: Saving Codex thread to Nowledge Mem...
